caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and large over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain with a pendant and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. To his left, a white wall features a vertical column of gold stars and the text "HUSTLE" repeated. Behind him, a sign reads "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a red and white logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". The man's t-shirt has the words "CHECK IT" printed on the chest. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking into the microphone; his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, and he moves his head slightly from side to side while maintaining his focus toward someone off-camera.
